hero.description: "Too Far Logistics and Consulting" LLC provides consulting services on the registration of BAQM in the AQTA and to determine the possibility of registration of preparations as BAQM, in a short time by the Analytical Expertise Center.
bulletPoints: Obtaining an opinion from the AEM in an operational manner
Registration of the BAQM in the AQTA as soon as possible
Obtaining a sales certificate for IGM from the AQTA
Obtaining an AQTA certificate during the import process of BAQM

business.heading: Just place an order, we will deliver your products to the laboratory.
business.description: Entrepreneurs operating in the field of food industry can use the services provided through the mobile application and order an expeditor.

features.cityDeliveryDesc: Delivery of food samples for entrepreneurs operating in Baku and Absheron
features.intercityDeliveryDesc: Delivery of food samples for entrepreneurs operating in the regions
features.cateringDesc: Providing quality food service to over 1,000 employees of our clients on a daily basis.

steps.title: Register
steps.desc: Sign up via our mobile app

extraServices.heading: Additional Services
extraServices.intro: In addition, we offer a number of additional services to our clients.
items: Design of food production facilities
Provision of consultancy services in the field of food supply
Training against food safety and food fraud
Conducting multi-module trainings on the stages of food production
Training on international requirements of HACCP principles
Training on international requirements of PRP advanced international practices
Organization of documentation for import and export processes of animal feed
Organization of documentation for import and export processes of veterinary preparations
Organization of documentation for registration and import processes of seeds
Organization of documentation for registration and import of agrochemicals
Organization of documentation for registration and import of pesticides
Expertise of documents for obtaining hygienic certificates for non-food products
Collection of relevant documents related to the disposal of animals
Involvement of personnel in contact with food and food products in medical examinations
Providing consultancy services for obtaining food registry extracts for enterprises

billing.heading: Modern Solutions
billing.description: With the new mobile application, you can simply register and enter:
items: Company name
TIN
Address registered with AQTA for sample collection
Details of the responsible person participating in the sample collection process
Number of samples
Product name
billing.afterItems: We have more than 50 special vehicles available for delivery according to your choice. From the moment you place the order, you will be able to see the date and time of the pick up.

cardDeal.heading: Detailed reports about your orders.
cardDeal.description: For each order you make, we are registering the data and when you need it you can get the daily, weekly, monthly and yearly transparent reports.

showcase.heading: About Us
showcase.description: "TOO FAR Logistics" LLC was established in 2022. Our mission is to provide entrepreneurs in the food industry the ability to track the delivery of their product samples to laboratories through our platform.

testimonials.description: Now you can also register from our app to become partner with us and ensure fast and safe delivery of your food products.

cta.heading: Order an expeditor right now!
cta.description: Deliver your product samples faster, safer and under the right conditions.

footer.tagline: Urgent and operative service for delivering your food samples to laboratories.
